title: Using Parenthesis to Enhance Your Story

questions.question: What does "recollection" mean?
options: fictional technology or devices in this story
yellow flowers, often with a trumpet-shaped central part
a specific type of robot mentioned in the story
a memory or the act of remembering something
questions.correct_answer: a memory or the act of remembering something
questions.explanation: "recollection" means: a memory or the act of remembering something

questions.question: What does "daffodils" mean?
options: yellow flowers, often with a trumpet-shaped central part
a specific type of robot mentioned in the story
fictional technology or devices in this story
a memory or the act of remembering something
questions.correct_answer: yellow flowers, often with a trumpet-shaped central part
questions.explanation: "daffodils" means: yellow flowers, often with a trumpet-shaped central part

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Parenthesis is a way to add extra, ______ information into a sentence.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Parenthesis is a way to add extra, non-essential information into a sentence."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Dashes are one type of punctuation used for parenthesis.
Using parenthesis can make your writing more detailed and interesting.
It can also influence the tone of a character's voice in a story.
Parenthesis is a way to add extra, non-essential information into a sentence.
questions.correct_answer: Dashes are one type of punctuation used for parenthesis.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Dashes are one type of punctuation used for parenthesis." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "jinn / gobey" mean?
options: a memory or the act of remembering something
fictional technology or devices in this story
yellow flowers, often with a trumpet-shaped central part
a specific type of robot mentioned in the story
questions.correct_answer: fictional technology or devices in this story
questions.explanation: "jinn / gobey" means: fictional technology or devices in this story
